# Support

> **public support channel:** GitHub Discussions, Issues, release links, raw bootstrap URLs, and the security policy are public launch surfaces. Keep them anonymously accessible before announcements and after every release.

This document is the canonical boundary for community support, GitHub Sponsors, private security reporting, sponsored educational content, and optional consulting. It is not a service agreement.

## Support channel matrix

| Request type | Channel | What to include | Expected handling |
|--------------|---------|-----------------|-------------------|
| Question / troubleshooting | [GitHub Discussions (Q&A)](https://github.com/sky2464/AgToosa/discussions/new?category=q-a) | What you tried, OS/shell, install command, relevant logs | Community best-effort triage |
| Reproducible bug | [Bug report issue](https://github.com/sky2464/AgToosa/issues/new?template=bug.yml) | Steps to reproduce, expected vs actual, environment | Community best-effort triage |
| Feature proposal | [Feature request](https://github.com/sky2464/AgToosa/issues/new?template=feature.yml) or [Discussions](https://github.com/sky2464/AgToosa/discussions) | Use case, motivation, expected behavior | Community best-effort discussion |
| Security vulnerability | Private only — see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) | Description, reproduction, impact | Private intake; no public issue |
| Consulting inquiry | Outside open-source channels (see below) | Scope under a separately executed agreement | Not an open-source support entitlement |

## Before asking

- Check the [README](../README.md) and the workflow files in `template/Docs/`
- Search [existing discussions](https://github.com/sky2464/AgToosa/discussions?discussions_q=) and [closed issues](https://github.com/sky2464/AgToosa/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aclosed)

## Best-effort expectations

Community maintenance is **best effort**. Public channels invite participation but do **not** promise acknowledgement, response time, resolution time, uptime, business hours, or an SLA. Any timing or delivery commitments exist only in a separately executed written agreement, not in this repository's documentation.

## GitHub Sponsors

The official sponsor destination is **[GitHub Sponsors for @sky2464](https://github.com/sponsors/sky2464)** (configured in [`.github/FUNDING.yml`](FUNDING.yml)).

Sponsorship is **voluntary**. Sponsorship does not guarantee support priority, response time, roadmap influence, private releases, or feature access. Recognition (for example a sponsor listing) may be offered as thanks; it is not a product entitlement.

## Open-source feature parity

Everyone who obtains AgToosa under its open-source license gets the **same public project features**, releases, fixes, and workflow capabilities **regardless of sponsorship** or consulting status. There are **no sponsor-only** gates on public functionality.

## Sponsored educational content

If AgToosa publishes sponsored educational material, the sponsor and editorial/conflict boundary will be disclosed on that material. Sponsorship of educational content does **not** grant governance control, security-reporting preference, favorable benchmark treatment, or gated open-source functionality.

## Optional consulting

Maintainers may offer optional consulting as a **separate commercial relationship**. Payment does not grant project governance control, roadmap votes, security-reporting preference, favorable evidence treatment, private releases, or gated open-source features. Obligations, if any, exist only in a separately executed agreement — not in project docs.
